title: Wilckia africana
taxonomy: Wilckia africana is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Wilckia, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the soapberry family. The family Sapindaceae is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Within the family Sapindaceae, Wilckia africana is further classified as a species within the genus Wilckia.
